summary: Frontend-only testing of 5 SEO landing pages (/marketing-os, /seller-acquisition, /ai-campaign-generator, /competitor-analysis, /asset-analysis). All routes render with correct titles, unique H1s, full <CVSeo> head (canonical/OG/Twitter), 4 valid JSON-LD blocks (Organization, SoftwareApplication, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage), 6 body sections, 3 internal links to OTHER slugs, FAQ section, final CTA. Footer Platform column lists all 5 routes. Internal-link click navigation, footer link navigation, primary CTA → /dashboard, and sitemap.xml inclusion of all 5 routes all verified working.

issues: Duplicate <meta name='description'> tags: one static from /app/frontend/public/index.html (generic copy: '...analyzes competitors, and executes growth workflows...') AND one page-specific from react-helmet (CVSeo). Both remain in DOM. og:description IS unique per page (helmet works), but standard meta description shows a duplicate. Recommend removing the static description tag from public/index.html so react-helmet's per-page value is the single source of truth.

action_items: MINOR/OPTIONAL: Remove the static <meta name='description'> from /app/frontend/public/index.html (line 7) so react-helmet's per-page descriptions from CVSeo are not duplicated in the DOM. og:description is already unique per page, so this is a tidy-up rather than a blocker.
critical_code_review_comments: SeoLandingTemplate.jsx is clean (~285 lines), data-driven from JSON, has all required data-testid attributes (seo-landing-h1, seo-landing-section-0..5, internal-link-<slug>, seo-landing-faq, seo-landing-final-cta-primary, seo-landing-cta-primary, footer-platform-links).

Each page's content.internal_links correctly excludes its own slug (verified: marketing-os → [seller-acquisition, ai-campaign-generator, asset-analysis]; seller-acquisition → [marketing-os, ai-campaign-generator, competitor-analysis]; ai-campaign-generator → [marketing-os, asset-analysis, seller-acquisition]; competitor-analysis → [marketing-os, seller-acquisition, ai-campaign-generator]; asset-analysis → [marketing-os, ai-campaign-generator, competitor-analysis]).
JSON-LD schema generation via ORG_SCHEMA, SOFTWARE_SCHEMA, buildBreadcrumbSchema, buildFaqSchema is clean and produces 4 valid parseable JSON blocks per page.
Canonical URLs correctly use https://cortexviral.com/<slug> on all 5 pages.
Footer Platform column (data-testid='footer-platform-links') contains exactly the 5 expected links in correct order.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round 2 SEO landing pages (/marketing-os, /seller-acquisition, /ai-campaign-generator, /competitor-analysis, /asset-analysis) are fully verified for rendering, schemas, internal links, footer integration, and CTA navigation. The only nit is a duplicate <meta name='description'> caused by a static description in public/index.html alongside react-helmet's per-page injection — non-blocking. All sections, data-testids, JSON-LD types, canonical URLs, and sitemap entries verified at iteration_31. No retest required.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The duplicate meta description is caused by /app/frontend/public/index.html line 7 having a static <meta name='description'> tag while CVSeo (react-helmet) also injects a page-specific one. react-helmet does not remove pre-existing static head tags it didn't create, so both coexist. Fix: delete line 7 of public/index.html (or leave as a fallback if helmet ever fails to mount).
